title: oxalis schaeferi
intro: Oxalis schaeferi, also known as the purple wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Oxalidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Oxalis schaeferi include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Oxalis schaeferi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
